Metadata.Name: FileName
Metadata.Value: C:\USERS\MD KAIF ANSARI\ONEDRIVE - G7 CR TECHNOLOGIES INDIA PVT LTD\DESKTOP\RBAC_GIT_ADO\ROLEBASED\RBAC.DATABASE.FROMEXISTING\OBJ\DEBUG\RBAC.DATABASE.FROMEXISTING.DLL

Metadata.Name: AssemblySymbolsName
Metadata.Value: C:\Users\MD KAIF ANSARI\OneDrive - G7 CR Technologies India Pvt Ltd\Desktop\RBAC_GIT_ADo\RoleBased\RBAC.Database.FromExisting\obj\Debug\RBAC.Database.FromExisting.pdb

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT COUNT(1) FROM Permissions WHERE RoleId = @RoleId AND LOWER(PageName) = LOWER(@PageName) AND CanRead = 1 END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
HeaderContents
BodyScript
HeaderContents
BodyScript
HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, UserId, Action, Timestamp, IP FROM AuditLogs WHERE UserId = @UserId ORDER BY Timestamp DESC END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, UserId, Action, Timestamp, IP, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TotalCount FROM AuditLogs ORDER BY Timestamp DESC OFFSET (@Page - 1) * @PageSize ROWS FETCH NEXT @PageSize ROWS ONLY END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalOrders, ISNULL(SUM(Price * Quantity), 0) AS TotalSales FROM Orders END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE sp_GetDashboardReport AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT TOP 3 PasswordHash FROM PasswordHistory WHERE UserId = @UserId ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, ProductName, Quantity, Price, UserId, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TotalCount FROM Orders WHERE @IsAdmin = 1 OR UserId = @UserId ORDER BY Id OFFSET (@Page - 1) * @PageSize ROWS FETCH NEXT @PageSize ROWS ONLY END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT ph.Id, ph.UserId, u.Name AS UserName, u.Email, ph.PasswordHash, ph.CreatedAt FROM PasswordHistory ph INNER JOIN Users u ON ph.UserId = u.Id WHERE ph.UserId = @UserId ORDER BY ph.CreatedAt DESC END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT PageName, CanRead, CanWrite FROM Permissions WHERE RoleId = @RoleId END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, RoleName FROM Roles WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, RoleName FROM Roles WHERE LOWER(RoleName) = LOWER(@RoleName) END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, RoleName FROM Roles END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE sp_GetRoles AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, Name, Email, PasswordHash, RoleId, MustChangePassword, ProfilePicture, FailedLoginAttempts, IsLocked, LockedAt FROM Users WHERE Email = @Email END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, Name, Email, PasswordHash, RoleId, MustChangePassword, ProfilePicture, FailedLoginAttempts, IsLocked, LockedAt FROM Users WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT Id, Name, Email, RoleId, MustChangePassword, ProfilePicture, FailedLoginAttempts, IsLocked, LockedAt FROM Users END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE sp_GetUsers AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Permissions WHERE RoleId = @RoleId AND LOWER(PageName) = LOWER(@PageName) AND CanRead = 1 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET FailedLoginAttempts = FailedLoginAttempts + 1, IsLocked = CASE WHEN FailedLoginAttempts + 1 >= 5 THEN 1 ELSE IsLocked END, LockedAt = CASE WHEN FailedLoginAttempts + 1 >= 5 THEN SYSUTCDATETIME() ELSE LockedAt END WHERE Id = @UserId END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
HeaderContents
BodyScript
HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN INSERT INTO RefreshTokens (Token, ExpiryDate, IsRevoked, UserId) VALUES (@Token, @ExpiryDate, 0, @UserId) END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN INSERT INTO Users (Id, Name, Email, PasswordHash, RoleId) VALUES (@Id, @Name, @Email, @PasswordHash, @RoleId) END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET FailedLoginAttempts = 0, IsLocked = 0, LockedAt = NULL WHERE Id = @UserId END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE RefreshTokens SET IsRevoked = 1 WHERE Token = @Token END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET FailedLoginAttempts = 0, IsLocked = 0, LockedAt = NULL WHERE Id = @UserId END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Orders SET ProductName = @ProductName, Quantity = @Quantity, Price = @Price WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET PasswordHash = @PasswordHash, MustChangePassword = @MustChangePassword WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET Name = @Name, Email = @Email WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET ProfilePicture = @ProfilePicture WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET Name = @Name, Email = @Email, PasswordHash = @PasswordHash, RoleId = @RoleId WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
BodyScript
Property.Value: BEGIN UPDATE Users SET Name = @Name, Email = @Email, RoleId = @RoleId WHERE Id = @Id END

Property.Name: HeaderContents
